item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Preschool Classroom Playset Learning Toys for 4 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids Creative Pretend-Play with 2 Mini-Dolls and 4 Micro-Dolls Birthday Gift Idea 42636
item.description: You can find LEGO Friends Heartlake City Preschool Classroom Playset Learning Toys for 4 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids Creative Pretend-Play with 2 Mini-Dolls and 4 Micro-Dolls Birthday Gift Idea 42636 with a discount here: ℹ️: Building toy for kids – Join your little one as they enjoy pretend play with the characters, who are learning about emotions, nature and friendships Nursery accessories – Includes a pirate hat, plates, mugs, snacks, a paint palette and magnifying glass plus frog, ladybird and bee elements Includes 2 mini-dolls and 4 micro-dolls – Comes with LEGO Friends characters Liann and Colette, Basem, Victoria, Peter and Alba, plus a bunny Discover more LEGO sets and friendship stories – Check out other toys (sold separately) in the LEGO Friends range, where kids can enjoy building real-life adventures for a diverse range of characters A best-friend gift – This LEGO Friends set makes a great gift idea for 4+-year-old girls and boys, with characters and accessories for storytelling Pretend-play classroom playset – Heartlake City Preschool toy for 4+-year-old girls and boys features a buildable preschool and loads of accessories 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Amy s Animal Rescue Island Playset Buildable Toy with 6 Characters including Amy & Tails Figures Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 7 Plus Years Old 76992
item.description: You can find LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Amy s Animal Rescue Island Playset Buildable Toy with 6 Characters including Amy & Tails Figures Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 7 Plus Years Old 76992 with a discount here: ℹ️: This Sonic LEGO set includes a buildable island, 6 Sonic the Hedgehog characters: Amy, a Tails figure, plus Crabmeat, Picky, Pocky and a Flicky The set also includes a drawbridge with a waterfall trap, and a bucket with sand elements for kids to have fun building toy sand castles LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Amy’s Animal Rescue Island toy set for kids aged 7+ features an activity-packed island with 6 characters and loads of fun!

item.title: LEGO Friends Stargazing Camping Vehicle Set with 4x4 Car Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids Featuring Nova and Aliya Mini-Doll Characters Plus Dog and Hedgehog Animal Figures Gift Idea 42603
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Friends Stargazing Camping Vehicle Set with 4x4 Car Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids Featuring Nova and Aliya Mini-Doll Characters Plus Dog and Hedgehog Animal Figures Gift Idea 42603 here: ℹ️: Camping toy accessories for fun adventures – Comes with a telescope, mugs, cookies, binoculars, a torch, extra stars and prints of different planets Stargazing Camping Vehicle playset – Includes a buildable 4x4 car toy with trailer and tent, telescope, 2 mini-dolls, a dog and a hedgehog figure A gift idea for kids – Makes a fun birthday gift for 7 plus year old girls, boys and kids who are fans of cool toy cars and cute animal figures Create constellations – Kids can make their own constellations for the LEGO Friends characters using the planets and stars to decorate the backdrop 2 mini-dolls and 2 animal figures – This set includes Nova and Aliya LEGO Friends mini-dolls plus a dog and a hedgehog animal figures 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 31129 Creator 3 in 1 Majestic Tiger to Panda or Koi Fish Set Animal Figures Collectible Building Toy Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 9 Plus Years Old
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 31129 Creator 3 in 1 Majestic Tiger to Panda or Koi Fish Set Animal Figures Collectible Building Toy Gifts for Kids Boys & Girls 9 Plus Years Old here: ℹ️: The posable tiger toy can move its body, head, jaw, tail, legs and shoulders & the red toy panda can move its head, tail, legs, feet and ears Kids can choose their all-action stories with 3 LEGO Creator animal toys or fire up their imagination and create a new animal with the bricks Details include the tiger with a red bird and jungle display, the red panda with a bonsai tree and bamboo and koi fish with water lilies The koi fish buildable toy figure has a posable body, flippers and tail for underwater fun This LEGO Creator 3 in 1 set features 3 animal toys for kids to build: tiger toy, red panda and koi fish moels accompanied by a smaller model 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Disney Elsa & Bruni in the Enchanted Forest Frozen 2 Learning Toy for 2 Plus Year Old Toddlers Girls & Boys with 4 Characters Incl an Els Mini-Doll Figure Birthday Gift Idea 10418
item.description: You can find LEGO DUPLO Disney Elsa & Bruni in the Enchanted Forest Frozen 2 Learning Toy for 2 Plus Year Old Toddlers Girls & Boys with 4 Characters Incl an Els Mini-Doll Figure Birthday Gift Idea 10418 with a discount here: ℹ️: Birthday gift idea for toddlers – Treat a toddler who’s on their best behaviour with this buildable fantasy toy, a fun Disney-themed gift for 2 plus year old toddlers, girls, boys and fans of Disney’s Frozen 2 film Includes accessories recognisable from the film – Comes with a snow crystal, Bruni’s pink flame element and a buildable snow scene for creative play Fun role play – Toddlers imagine they’re Elsa, Bruni or the Nokk water horse travelling through the forest to befriend the Earth Giant Learning through play – LEGO DUPLO toddler building toys engage preschoolers and develop their fine motor skills and self-expression Disney Frozen 2 toddler building toy – Includes a forest scene, Elsa mini-doll, Bruni the salamander, Nokk water horse figure and an Earth Giant Disney Building toy for Frozen 2 fans – Whisk toddlers away on an adventure with this LEGO DUPLO Disney Elsa & Bruni in the Enchanted Forest set 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Animal Crossing Nook’s Cranny & Rosie s House Creative Building Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys Includes 2 Characters from the Video Game Series Birthday Gift Idea 77050
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Animal Crossing Nook’s Cranny & Rosie s House Creative Building Toy for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys Includes 2 Characters from the Video Game Series Birthday Gift Idea 77050 at the following link: ℹ️: Buildable Animal Crossing toy – Visit Nook’s Cranny to shop for tools or borrow Bells, then drop by at Rosie’s house for cupcakes Animal Crossing sets include digital building instructions – The LEGO Builder app features a digital version of the building instructions included with this set Story starters – Includes lots of iconic elements: a DIY recipe card, bulletin board, cupcake, fish bait, plus a tree with a surprise inside Customisable set – Building toy for kids comes with Rosie and Tom Nook minifigures, 2 iconic Animal Crossing buildings and interchangeable baseplates Nook’s Cranny & Rosie’s House set – Animal Crossing buildable toy for 7+ year old girls and boys who are fans of the video game series Animal Crossing gift – This set makes a special occasion or birthday gift for 7-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who are fans of the video game series 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Friends Horse Training Pony Stable Set with 2 Toy Horses Aliya and Mia Mini-Doll Figures Animal Care Gift for Kids Girls and Boys Aged 4 Plus 41746
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Friends Horse Training Pony Stable Set with 2 Toy Horses Aliya and Mia Mini-Doll Figures Animal Care Gift for Kids Girls and Boys Aged 4 Plus 41746 here: ℹ️: There is also a handy Starter Brick included in the LEGO Friends toy animals set and ‘quick-start’ elements to help kids build with confidence Features LEGO Friends Aliya with a helmet and Mia mini-dolls, their pet horse and pony figures plus apple, carrot, shampoo and more elements This LEGO Friends animal toy playset makes a fun horse-themed gift for girls and boys aged 4+ that will delight kids while building and playing creatively With this horse riding toy, kids can spin the wheel to see which of chore in the horse stable needs to be completed next and then get to work This LEGO Friends Horse Training set for kids aged 4+ features a horse stable toy, horse and pony figures, plus 2 mini-dolls for fun on the farm The LEGO 4+ set includes a 2-floored toy horse stable with a balcony, plus 2 jumps and lots of accessories, such as a saddle, trophy and helmet 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids here: ℹ️: This castles toy for kids 4-level tower features movable Grand Staircase spiral steps at its base, potions room, treasure room with chest Accessory elements include 7 wands, 3 tumblers, an umbrella, lantern, broom, sorting hat, cauldrons, potions, candles, brooms and many more The castles turret features the Mirror of Erised with changeable pictures and roosting spot for Fawkes figure Includes 10 minifigures: Harry Potter, Ron Weasley, Hermione Granger, Draco Malfoy, Susan Bones, Professor McGonagall, and Albus Dumbledore Also includes Professor Quirrell with dual Lord Voldemort face, Hagrid, Nearly Headless Nick, buildable Basilisk plus Hedwig & Scabbers figures Features Hogwarts Castles Great Hall with house banners, tower with movable spiral staircase, potions room and treasure room!

item.title: LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure at the following link: ℹ️: Accessories include a map, torch, pistol, treasure chest, telescope, goblets, 2 sabres and many more details, like flags, barrels and lanterns On the spooky island, a handle allows kids to open and close the skull, or they can hide the gold in the Pirate Inn’s secret hidey-hole This LEGO Creator set for aspiring pirates features 3 models in 1: a classic Pirate Ship toy, rustic Pirates’ Inn and mysterious Skull Island The pirate ship toy features an opening roof and wall to access the cabin, a foretop to keep watch for targets and rotating cannons for more fun Includes 2 pirate minifigures in full costume with sabres, 1 deckhand sailor plus buildable shark and bird figures and a skeleton figure This LEGO Creator 3in1 set, featuring a pirate ship toy, makes a great birthday gift for a son or daughter, or Christmas present for swashbuckling kids, boys and girls aged 9+ years old 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO City Cargo Train Toy with Motorized Remote Control Engine incl. Rail Tracks Signal Lights & Control Center - 6-12 Year Old Boys & Girls Gifts - 60198
item.description: You can find LEGO City Cargo Train Toy with Motorized Remote Control Engine incl. Rail Tracks Signal Lights & Control Center - 6-12 Year Old Boys & Girls Gifts - 60198 with a discount here: ℹ️: The Cargo Train set for kids aged 6+ years old features a battery powered train toy with 4 cars, plus a control centre, armoured truck and forklift toys Kids can push the lever on the LEGO train track switch to drive the remote control train toy to a different track for loading or unloading Includes a motorized engine with 10-speed Bluetooth remote control, pantograph on the opening roof, and driver’s cabin with control panel Includes 6 LEGO City minifigures: 4 train workers, a security officer and a crook for imaginative role-play with this LEGO train set for kids LEGO City Train toys and sets with battery powered up motors (batteries not included) are a first-class Christmas or Birthday gifts for kids, boys and girls Also includes a control center with signal lights, toy train tracks with 16 curved rails, 16 straight rails and a railroad switch with lever 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle Model Big Collectable Set with the Great Hall Sword of Gryffindor & Chamber of Secrets Wizarding World Gift Idea for Fans 71043
item.description: You can find LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle Model Big Collectable Set with the Great Hall Sword of Gryffindor & Chamber of Secrets Wizarding World Gift Idea for Fans 71043 with a discount here: ℹ️: Accessory elements include the Sword of Gryffindor, Helga Hufflepuff´s cup, wands, potions, house banners, flames, a cauldron and 2 magnifying glasses. Buildable microscale model of Hogwarts Castle, hut of Hagrid, Whomping Willow tree and 5 boats Hagrid’s hut has Aragog the spider and buildable pumpkins The Whomping Willow includes the buildable blue Flying Ford Anglia car in its spinning branches Hogwarts Castle features the Great Hall with buildable ‘stained glass windows, house banners, benches, tables, flaming torches and moving staircases 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces here: ℹ️: This iconic AT-AT Walker also has foldout panels, a speeder bike, winch and bottom hatch so Luke can throw in the thermal detonator element Includes 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Luke Skywalker, General Veers, 2 AT-AT Drivers and 2 Snowtroopers, all with weapons Celebrate the iconic series with this Star Wars 40th Anniversary set, a LEGO brick version of the iconic AT-AT Walker Star Wars building toy This set will impress for sure when put on display, and it makes a fantastic LEGO Star Wars gift for kids, boys and girls aged 10 plus The Star Wars AT-AT figure features posable legs, a posable head with opening cockpit for 3 minifigures and spring-loaded shooters 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 75948 Harry Potter TM Hogwarts Clock Tower
item.description: You can find LEGO 75948 Harry Potter TM Hogwarts Clock Tower with a discount here: ℹ️: This LEGO Harry Potter buildable toy includes 8 minifigures: Harry, Ron, Hermione, Fleur, Cedric, Viktor, Dumbledore and Madame Maxime Number of pieces: 922 Locations include the Defense Against the Dark Arts classroom, Dumbledore’s Office, Hospital Wing, Prefects’ Bathroom and a Yule Ball scene Manufacturer recommended age: 9+ Hogwarts Clock Tower 🛒 Buy it!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |

item.title: LEGO Technic 42111 La Dodge Charger de Dom Maquette Voiture de Course a Construire Fast and Furious Idée Cadeau
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic 42111 La Dodge Charger de Dom Maquette Voiture de Course a Construire Fast and Furious Idée Cadeau at the following link: ℹ️: Dom’s Dodge Charger race car is an awesome replica model of the classic muscle car, inspired by the original 1970 Dodge Charger R/T Authentic features let fans recreate the thrill of driving the real car, with moving pistons, suspension, steering system and air blower Number of Pieces: 1,077 Makes the ideal gift for any car, Fast & Furious enthusiast, boy, girl man or woman; perfectly sized to create an awesome display piece to show off Check out the V8 engine, plus two nitro bottles for extra power.
